context: Tests whether the agent produces an App Store Optimization launch plan that follows the skill's search visibility, conversion, Custom Product Page, Product Page Optimization, localization, and review-prompt guidance.

checklist.name: Visibility conversion split
checklist.description: Separates search visibility work from conversion-rate work.

checklist.name: Relevance priority
checklist.description: Prioritizes habit-tracker-relevant keywords and avoids duplicate terms across title, subtitle, category, and keyword field.

checklist.name: Indexed surfaces
checklist.description: Uses app name, subtitle, keyword field, and primary category as key search-relevance surfaces.

checklist.name: No description stuffing
checklist.description: Does not recommend adding description keywords for ranking and presents the description as conversion copy.

checklist.name: Screenshot benefits
checklist.description: Plans the first screenshots around benefits or outcomes, not onboarding, splash, loading, or generic feature labels.

checklist.name: Promotional text
checklist.description: Uses promotional text as current conversion messaging that can rotate for launches, seasons, or events.

checklist.name: Custom pages
checklist.description: Plans Custom Product Pages for distinct audiences or acquisition channels and includes either the 70-page capacity or assigned keyword search visibility.

checklist.name: PPO mechanics
checklist.description: Plans Product Page Optimization with no more than three treatments, selected localization guidance, and one hypothesis at a time.

checklist.name: Positive review timing
checklist.description: Places review prompts after positive user moments and notes that StoreKit decides whether the prompt appears.
